The isReadOnly option allows to display the eui-editor content in read only mode. Recommended usage is to map the isReadOnly value to the edit mode's active state value. Example: [isReadOnly]="isEditActive".
Please note that this option overrides and has precedence on the isEnabledOnFocus=true option when used together.
Interactive toggle — isReadOnly = {{isReadOnly}}
Html content
Quill formatted lists
Html formatted lists
JSON content
